comments.text: The recent experience was worst. I have registered the claim. Initially the acko person started the smooth communication and started some online procedures. After that they started telling many unknown rules which is not at all mentioned in the policy and avoid the claim. Finally rejected the claim giving random reasons. Acko has many hiden rules which is not be executed during the new policy registration. They mentions attractive contents in the policy and they make us do the policy. At the time of claim they give many unknown reasons and rejects claim. Dear owners don't attract to the content, experience it.

comments.text: If your car is banged and you have acko insurance, first park your side on the side of the road. Open Acko app, take photos as instructed after starting a new claim. The process is simple but you have to make sure you give it 10 minutes of your good mind time. Make sure you have your car papers and license of person driving handy. Further follow the instructions Acko gives. Please take number of the garage where your car will be repaired. Be in constant touch with them. Hold the accountable. Make sure you don't leave any AirPods or items in the car. It will be stolen. If you have further queries feel free to ask me. I am always here for you.
comments.author: @KanwarAnand
